title: wolftpm/src/lib.rs: stale 'stub' crate-level doc when API is implemented
description: wolftpm/src/lib.rs line 6-8 says: 'This crate is a stub — the build infrastructure is functional but the high-level Rust API has not yet been implemented. Contributions welcome.' This is false: device.rs implements Device::open(), Device::get_random(), Device::pcr_read(), Device::with_ecc_key(); key.rs implements EccKey::sign() and EccKey::verify(). The stale doc comment will mislead users away from a working API. Update the crate-level doc to accurately describe what is implemented.
